---
title: "01-simulate"
format: html
---

## Simulate data

```{r}
#| label: setup
#| include: false

library(tidyverse)
library(faux)
library(cmdstanr)
library(brms)
library(posterior)
```

```{r}
between <- list(language = c("English", "Italian", "Polish"))
within <- list(
  voicing = c("Voiceless", "Voiced"),
  syllables = c("Mono", "Di"),
  repetition = 1:5
)

mu <- list(
  English = rep(c(100, 80, 120, 95), each = 5),
  Italian = rep(c(100, 80, 120, 90), each = 5),
  Polish = rep(c(100, 80, 120, 86), each = 5)
)

set.seed(8127)
sim_data <- sim_design(
  within, between, 
  n = 15, mu = mu, sd = 10, r = .5,
  empirical = FALSE, plot = FALSE, long = TRUE
) |> 
  mutate(
    lang_syl = paste(language, syllables, sep = "_")
  ) |> 
  filter(lang_syl %in% c("English_Mono", "English_Di", "Italian_Di", "Polish_Di"))
```

```{r}
sim_data |> 
  ggplot(aes(syllables, y, colour = voicing)) +
  geom_jitter(position = position_jitterdodge(), alpha = 0.5) +
  facet_grid(cols = vars(language))
```

```{r}
bm_1_dat <- list(
  N = nrow(sim_data),
  P = length(unique(sim_data$id)),
  L = 3,
  y = log(sim_data$y),
  voicing = as.numeric(sim_data$voicing) - 1,
  # di = 0 and mono = 1
  syllables = as.numeric(as.numeric(sim_data$syllables) == 1),
  participant = as.numeric(as.factor(sim_data$id)),
  language = as.numeric(as.factor(sim_data$language))
)
```

```{r}
bm_1_mod <- cmdstan_model("scripts/bm-1.stan")
```

```{r}
bm_1_fit <- bm_1_mod$sample(
  data = bm_1_dat,
  seed = 2183,
  chains = 4, parallel_chains = 4
)
```
